spec.name: A Swirling Sandstorm
spec.description: You are caught in the midst of a massive sandstorm. Howling winds buffet you from all sides, and the sand tears at your skin, blinding you and choking you. You have lost all sense of direction.

north.description: You see only a wall of whirling, blowing, dry sand.

east.description: You see only a wall of whirling, blowing, dry sand.

south.description: You see only a wall of whirling, blowing, dry sand.

west.description: You see only a wall of whirling, blowing, dry sand.

extra_descs.description: Sand is about all you CAN see right now. Unfortunately, it isn't very interesting sand, only white, dry, and blowing all over the place.
